Package com.bfo.json

Interface JsonStream

All Known Implementing Classes:
CborWriter, JsonBuilder, JsonWriter, MsgpackWriter
public interface JsonStream
A processor interface for Json stream events, such as those generated by a file parser or by traversing an existing Json object to write it out.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final class 
    JsonStream.Event
    The Events that are processed by a JsonStream

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    event(JsonStream.Event event)
    Process an event.
    static JsonStream
    getDebugger(JsonStream stream)
    Return a simple wrapper around the specified Stream which will log events to System.out
    default boolean
    isSorted()
    Return true if this JsonStream would prefer Map keys to be sorted.
    default void
    reset()
    Reset the stream.

  • Method Details

    • isSorted

      default boolean isSorted()
      Return true if this JsonStream would prefer Map keys to be sorted. Only event sources where the data is in memory (eg the Json object are expected to be able to comply with this. The default method implementation returns false.

    • event

      boolean event(JsonStream.Event event) throws IOException
      Process an event. Return true if the stream has completed. Any events submitted after this will cause an error
      Returns:
      true if the stream has completed
      Throws:
      IOException

    • reset

      default void reset()
      Reset the stream. When a single writer is reused for multiple object written in sequence, this can be called between each object to reset the internal state.
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if resetting is not supported for this stream type (the default)
      Since:
      2.1

    • getDebugger

      static JsonStream getDebugger(JsonStream stream)
      Return a simple wrapper around the specified Stream which will log events to System.out
      Parameters:
      stream - the stream to wrap, or null just to print them with no action
